stripe_checkout_brief.context: - Do research to understand the best practices for stripe checkout when using the customer portal - ALWAYS use Stripe Checkout for purchases - ALWAYS use Stripe Customer Portal for billing management - SIMPLIFY the UI as much as possible to rely on stripe handling UI / UX - MINIMIZE the number of pages that vary based on subscription status - Database is the source of truth - Webhook events are not always in the order they are received, we must check timestamps in db - If there is auth middleware, be sure to exclude the stripe webhook

flows.customer: - create a new stripe customer on signup, so we can assume a customer exists for every user
flows.new-purchase: - New purchase: If no active subscription → create Checkout Session (mode=subscription, customer_creation=always) and redirect. - Watch for relevant webhooks to update the database state - Update the database state based on the webhook events (log to subscription_events table and update subscriptions table) - If success, redirect back to /success page with success message - If error, redirect back to /error page with error message - /success page triggers a sync event to ensure the subscription populates to the frontend
flows.existing-subscriber: - If active subscription → create Customer Portal Session and redirect (plan, payment method, cancel). - Watch for relevant webhooks to update the database state - Update the database state based on the webhook events (log to subscription_events table and update subscriptions table) - If success, redirect back to /success page with success message - If error, redirect back to /error page with error message - /success page triggers a sync event to ensure the subscription populates to the frontend

stripe_checkout_brief.webhooks:
- customer.created: create a new stripe customer on signup, so we can assume a customer exists for every user. link customer_id in subscriptions table.
- checkout.session.completed: mark session as completed - checkout.session.expired: mark session as expired
- customer.subscription.created: if status is not incomplete, grant access. otherwise revoke access and notify user. - customer.subscription.updated: update subscription in subscriptions table - customer.subscription.deleted: mark subscription as canceled and revoke access
- checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded: update subscription in subscriptions table - checkout.session.async_payment_failed: update subscription in subscriptions table
stripe_checkout_brief.data_model: users: id, stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, subscription_status, current_period_end subscriptions: id, user_id, stripe_subscription_id (unique), status, current_period_end, cancel_at, canceled_at, pause_collection, price_id, billing_cycle_anchor, created_at, updated_at subscription_events: stripe_event_id (unique), event_type, event_data (json), subscription_id (FK, nullable), stripe_subscription_id, processed (bool), received_at indexes: unique(subscription_events.stripe_event_id), unique(subscriptions.stripe_subscription_id), index(subscription_events.subscription_id), index(subscription_events.stripe_subscription_id)
stripe_checkout_brief.erd:
erDiagram USERS { string id string stripe_subscription_id } SUBSCRIPTIONS { string id string user_id string stripe_subscription_id string stripe_customer_id enum status timestamp current_period_end timestamp cancel_at timestamp canceled_at string price_id timestamp billing_cycle_anchor timestamp created_at timestamp updated_at } SUBSCRIPTION_EVENTS { string stripe_event_id string stripe_customer_id string event_type json event_data string subscription_id string stripe_subscription_id enum status
boolean processed timestamp received_at
}
USERS ||--o| SUBSCRIPTIONS : has SUBSCRIPTIONS ||--o{ SUBSCRIPTION_EVENTS : has

webhook_events.customer_object_event: ``` { "id": "cus_NffrFeUfNV2Hib", "object": "customer", "address": null, "balance": 0, "created": 1680893993, "currency": null, "default_source": null, "delinquent": false, "description": null, "email": "jennyrosen@example.com", "invoice_prefix": "0759376C", "invoice_settings": { "custom_fields": null, "default_payment_method": null, "footer": null, "rendering_options": null }, "livemode": false, "metadata": {}, "name": "Jenny Rosen", "next_invoice_sequence": 1, "phone": null, "preferred_locales": [], "shipping": null, "tax_exempt": "none", "test_clock": null } ```
webhook_events.checkout_session_object_event: ``` { "id": "cs_test_a11YYufWQzNY63zpQ6QSNRQhkUpVph4WRmzW0zWJO2znZKdVujZ0N0S22u", "object": "checkout.session", "after_expiration": null, "allow_promotion_codes": null, "amount_subtotal": 2198, "amount_total": 2198, "automatic_tax": { "enabled": false, "liability": null, "status": null }, "billing_address_collection": null, "cancel_url": null, "client_reference_id": null, "consent": null, "consent_collection": null, "created": 1679600215, "currency": "usd", "custom_fields": [], "custom_text": { "shipping_address": null, "submit": null }, "customer": null, "customer_creation": "if_required", "customer_details": null, "customer_email": null, "expires_at": 1679686615, "invoice": null, "invoice_creation": { "enabled": false, "invoice_data": { "account_tax_ids": null, "custom_fields": null, "description": null, "footer": null, "issuer": null, "metadata": {}, "rendering_options": null } }, "livemode": false, "locale": null, "metadata": {}, "mode": "payment", "payment_intent": null, "payment_link": null, "payment_method_collection": "always", "payment_method_options": {}, "payment_method_types": [ "card" ], "payment_status": "unpaid", "phone_number_collection": { "enabled": false }, "recovered_from": null, "setup_intent": null, "shipping_address_collection": null, "shipping_cost": null, "shipping_details": null, "shipping_options": [], "status": "open", "submit_type": null, "subscription": null, "success_url": "https://example.com/success", "total_details": { "amount_discount": 0, "amount_shipping": 0, "amount_tax": 0 }, "url": "https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_a11YYufWQzNY63zpQ6QSNRQhkUpVph4WRmzW0zWJO2znZKdVujZ0N0S22u#fidkdWxOYHwnPyd1blpxYHZxWjA0SDdPUW5JbmFMck1wMmx9N2BLZjFEfGRUNWhqTmJ%2FM2F8bUA2SDRySkFdUV81T1BSV0YxcWJcTUJcYW5rSzN3dzBLPUE0TzRKTTxzNFBjPWZEX1NKSkxpNTVjRjN8VHE0YicpJ2N3amhWYHdzYHcnP3F3cGApJ2lkfGpwcVF8dWAnPyd2bGtiaWBabHFgaCcpJ2BrZGdpYFVpZGZgbWppYWB3dic%2FcXdwYHgl" } ```
webhook_events.subscription_object_event: ``` { "id": "sub_1MowQVLkdIwHu7ixeRlqHVzs", "object": "subscription", "application": null, "application_fee_percent": null, "automatic_tax": { "enabled": false, "liability": null }, "billing_cycle_anchor": 1679609767, "cancel_at": null, "cancel_at_period_end": false, "canceled_at": null, "cancellation_details": { "comment": null, "feedback": null, "reason": null }, "collection_method": "charge_automatically", "created": 1679609767, "currency": "usd", "customer": "cus_Na6dX7aXxi11N4", "days_until_due": null, "default_payment_method": null, { "id": "si_Na6dzxczY5fwHx", "object": "subscription_item", "created": 1679609768, "current_period_end": 1682288167, "current_period_start": 1679609767, "metadata": {}, "plan": { "id": "price_1MowQULkdIwHu7ixraBm864M", "object": "plan", "active": true, "amount": 1000, "amount_decimal": "1000", "billing_scheme": "per_unit", "created": 1679609766, "currency": "usd", "discounts": null, "custom_unit_amount": null, "livemode": false, "lookup_key": null, "metadata": {}, "nickname": null, "product": "prod_Na6dGcTsmU0I4R", "recurring": { "interval": "month", "interval_count": 1, "trial_period_days": null, "usage_type": "licensed" }, "tax_behavior": "unspecified", "tiers_mode": null, "transform_quantity": null, "type": "recurring", "unit_amount": 1000, "unit_amount_decimal": "1000" }, "quantity": 1, "subscription": "sub_1MowQVLkdIwHu7ixeRlqHVzs", "tax_rates": [] } ], "has_more": false, "total_count": 1, "url": "/v1/subscription_items?subscription=sub_1MowQVLkdIwHu7ixeRlqHVzs" }, "latest_invoice": "in_1MowQWLkdIwHu7ixuzkSPfKd", "livemode": false, "metadata": {}, "next_pending_invoice_item_invoice": null, "pending_invoice_item_interval": null, "pending_setup_intent": null, "pending_update": null, "schedule": null, "start_date": 1679609767, "status": "active", "test_clock": null, "transfer_data": null, "trial_end": null, "trial_settings": { "end_behavior": { "missing_payment_method": "create_invoice" } }, "trial_start": null } ```
